requirement_topic.en: ZESCO and CEC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, ERB Licensing, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ZESCO和CEC的BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、ERB许可及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ZESCO和CEC的BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、ERB許可及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: ZESCO (Zambia Electricity Supply Corporation) is the principal national utility responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution across most of Zambia. CEC (Copperbelt Energy Corporation) operates the distribution network in the Copperbelt mining region and supplies power directly to large mining consumers. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale solar-plus-storage projects, behind-the-meter mining and C&I installations, and GET FiT / Scaling Solar programme projects — require ERB (Energy Regulation Board) licensing under the Energy Regulation Act (Cap. 436) and grid-connection approval from ZESCO or CEC depending on the connection point. Zambia's national grid operates at 230/400 V (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V) at 50 Hz — aligned with the IEC standard voltage levels. China's domestic grid operates at 220/380 V (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — designed and parameterised for China's 220/380 V must be reconfigured and retested for Zambia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid before connection testing and commissioning. Specific BESS grid-connection technical requirements are typically defined in project-level connection agreements with ZESCO or CEC and may reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-5-2. A publicly accessible ZESCO or CEC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ZESCO or CEC.
summary.zh: ZESCO（赞比亚电力供应公司）是负责赞比亚大部分地区发电、输电和配电的主要国家电力公司。CEC（铜带能源公司）在铜带省采矿区运营配电网络，直接向大型采矿用户供电。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模的光伏+储能项目、表后采矿和工商业装置，以及GET FiT/推广太阳能项目——均须依据《能源监管法》（第436章）取得ERB（能源监管委员会）许可，并根据接入点向ZESCO或CEC取得并网批准。赞比亚国家电网运行参数为230/400 V（单相230 V、三相400 V）50 Hz——与IEC标准电压等级一致。中国国内电网运行参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。针对中国220/380 V设计和参数配置的BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——在接入测试和调试前须重新针对赞比亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行配置和重新测试。具体BESS并网技术要求通常在与ZESCO或CEC签订的项目级并网协议中规定，可能引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认ZESCO或CEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ZESCO或CEC获取。
summary.zht: ZESCO（尚比亞電力供應公司）是負責尚比亞大部分地區發電、輸電和配電的主要國家電力公司。CEC（銅帶能源公司）在銅帶省採礦區運營配電網絡，直接向大型採礦用戶供電。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模的光伏+儲能項目、表後採礦和工商業裝置，以及GET FiT/推廣太陽能項目——均須依據《能源監管法》（第436章）取得ERB（能源監管委員會）許可，並根據接入點向ZESCO或CEC取得併網批准。尚比亞國家電網運行參數為230/400 V（單相230 V、三相400 V）50 Hz——與IEC標準電壓等級一致。中國國內電網運行參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。針對中國220/380 V設計和參數配置的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——在接入測試和調試前須重新針對尚比亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行配置和重新測試。具體BESS併網技術要求通常在與ZESCO或CEC簽訂的項目級併網協議中規定，可能引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認ZESCO或CEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ZESCO或CEC獲取。

standards_or_laws: Energy Regulation Act, Cap. 436 — ERB licensing required for all grid-connected and off-grid commercial energy storage installations in Zambia
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Zambia grid parameters: 230/400 V (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V) at 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Zambia's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Zambia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与赞比亚230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对赞比亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與尚比亞230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對尚比亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ZESCO's or CEC's grid-connection requirements, and do not substitute for ERB licensing. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Zambia is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Zambia's grid; (b) ERB licensing — obtain ERB licence before grid-connected BESS commissioning; engage ERB early to determine applicable technical conditions; (c) ZESCO or CEC project-specific connection agreement terms — engage the relevant utility at the earliest project stage to obtain grid-connection technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project or utility specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA or communication interface protocol required by ZESCO or CEC for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific specification); (f) Copperbelt mining projects — CEC grid-connection requirements and mining-sector equipment procurement specifications may impose additional technical requirements beyond ZESCO's standard connection framework.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足ZESCO或CEC的并网要求，亦不能替代ERB许可。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——赞比亚为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并针对赞比亚电网重新测试；（b）ERB许可——在并网BESS投入使用前取得ERB许可；尽早与ERB接触以确定适用技术条件；（c）ZESCO或CEC项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，在项目最早阶段与相关电力公司接触以获取并网技术要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目或电力公司规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）通信协议——确认ZESCO或CEC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属规格）；（f）铜带省采矿项目——CEC并网要求和采矿业设备采购规格可能在ZESCO标准并网框架之外施加额外技术要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足ZESCO或CEC的併網要求，亦不能替代ERB許可。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——尚比亞為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並針對尚比亞電網重新測試；（b）ERB許可——在併網BESS投入使用前取得ERB許可；儘早與ERB接觸以確定適用技術條件；（c）ZESCO或CEC項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，在項目最早階段與相關電力公司接觸以獲取併網技術要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目或電力公司規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）通訊協議——確認ZESCO或CEC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬規格）；（f）銅帶省採礦項目——CEC併網要求和採礦業設備採購規格可能在ZESCO標準併網框架之外施加額外技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ERB licensing required for all grid-connected BESS in Zambia under the Energy Regulation Act; ZESCO or CEC grid-connection approval required depending on connection point; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Zambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy ZESCO's or CEC's Zambia grid-connection requirements and do not substitute for ERB licensing. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Zambia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. Obtain ERB licence before commissioning. Engage ZESCO or CEC at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA or communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible ZESCO or CEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement with the relevant utility is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足ZESCO或CEC赞比亚并网要求，亦不能替代ERB许可。BESS储能变流器须重新针对赞比亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。调试前须取得ERB许可。应在项目最早阶段与ZESCO或CEC接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ZESCO或CEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与相关电力公司接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足ZESCO或CEC尚比亞併網要求，亦不能替代ERB許可。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對尚比亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。調試前須取得ERB許可。應在項目最早階段與ZESCO或CEC接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ZESCO或CEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與相關電力公司接觸至關重要。
